svg.text: "Shift" mode: one-shot pitch shift here (before tank)
apout x level --> RMP0 pitch shift --> LPF --> shimOut, added at tank stage 0
POT0=RT | POT1=HF Damp | POT2=Mix (or fixed if no pin)
Tank Side A (tdl4# --> AP1 --> tdl1 --> HF damp --> AP2 --> tdl2)
Tank Side B (tdl2# --> AP3 --> tdl3 --> HF damp --> AP4 --> tdl4)
L = tdl1 + tdl2 - tdl3 + tdl4 (various offsets)
R = tdl1 - tdl2 + tdl3 + tdl4 (different offsets)
Topology 3: Ring Feedback Delay Network (3-4 stages)
Output Taps (1 per stage per channel)
L/R: different offsets + polarity for stereo decorrelation
One-shot pitch shift BEFORE the tank. No feedback through pitch shifter.
Added to tank stage 0 at unity
Pitch shift INSIDE the feedback loop. Each full tank cycle = another octave up.
Reverb time controls how many octave shifts accumulate. LPF tames brightness.
POT1=0: no damping (pass-through) | POT1=1: full LPF | Gain always <= 1.0
SpinCAD Designer - Reverb Designer | FV-1: 128 instructions, 32768 samples delay RAM, 32768 Hz sample rate
